Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package consists mostly of Fang Yuan's recollection of Ma Hongyun's story (a well-known figure's biography) and ordinary market events. The events described (Ma Hongyun saving the young clan leader, finding a silver relic gu, marrying Sheng Ling'er, etc.) are presented as known historical/backstory facts from Fang Yuan's perspective, not hidden knowledge. The market transactions (buying wolf-taming gu, eagle-wing gu) are ordinary visible events. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps can be extracted from this seed material.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly retrospective narration about Ma Hongyun's past (ch_0444 is a flashback/recap chapter). The only present-time actions are Fang Yuan walking in the market and buying gu worms. No clear observed motive with direct source support for a character motive candidate. Ma Hongyun's actions (saving the young master, finding the silver relic gu, falling into river) are described as accidental/coincidental, not driven by observable intent. Fang Yuan's actions are routine shopping. No strong observedMotive → inferredMotive chain available.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
圣家族长（圣家）明确派遣高手追杀马鸿运，圣灵儿偷家族宝蛊帮助马鸿运，形成家族内部压力。圣家作为部族/家族集体有明确利益关联。压力轴为族长对女儿婚姻的反对及家族资源被窃取。
IF export filter quarantined 4 legacy old-schema branches.
